reviews.comment:
Hay que mejorar el parque, cortar pasto limpieza, fumigar plagas. Adentro estaba caluroso por lo que no decidimos almorzar en el lugar. El baño estaba en condiciones, la señora del baño es muy atenta y de excelente trato, no me tuve la misma experiencia con la atención el autoservicio, las 2 chicas que atienden tienen mal trato y actitudes desagradables ( ojalá puedan modificar eso porque producen mucho malestar) . No pudimos usar los puntos en el autoservicio y ni pagar con la billetera de la app YPF según las chicas que cobran dicen que no se puede. MODIFIQUEN ESO POR FAVOR !!!!
Pase ayer por ahi ( 16 febrero 2026 la app ypf funciona pero con dificultades, el predio sigue sin atencion, Hay barro y baches... una pena.

(Translated by Google)
The park needs improvement: the grass needs mowing, it needs cleaning, and pest control is needed. It was hot inside, so we decided not to have lunch there. The restroom was in good condition, and the attendant was very attentive and friendly. However, I didn't have the same experience with the self-service area. The two women working there were rude and had unpleasant attitudes (I hope they can change that because it's very unpleasant). We couldn't use our points at the self-service station, nor could we pay with the YPF app wallet. According to the cashiers, it's not possible. PLEASE FIX THAT!!!!
I passed by there yesterday (February 16, 2026). The YPF app works, but with difficulties. The station is still not being attended to. There's mud and potholes... a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkeWM2OWJ3EAE
